from yolobit import *
button_a.on_pressed = None
button_b.on_pressed = None
button_a.on_pressed_ab = button_b.on_pressed_ab = -1
from mqtt import *
import time
from machine import RTC
import ntptime
from aiot_lcd1602 import LCD1602
from event_manager import *
from machine import Pin, SoftI2C
from aiot_dht20 import DHT20
from aiot_rgbled import RGBLed
import music

aiot_lcd1602 = LCD1602()

event_manager.reset()

aiot_dht20 = DHT20()

def on_event_timer_callback_D_h_N_j_h():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  aiot_dht20.read_dht20()
  RT = aiot_dht20.dht20_temperature()
  RH = aiot_dht20.dht20_humidity()
  LUX = round(translate((pin2.read_analog()), 0, 4095, 0, 100))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(0, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(RT)
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(4, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('*C')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(6, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('  ')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(8, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(RH)
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('%')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(11, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(' ')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(13, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(LUX)
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(15, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('%')
  mqtt.publish('phong-ngu.bbc-temp', RT)
  mqtt.publish('phong-ngu.bbc-hum', RH)
  mqtt.publish('phong-khach.bbc-bri', LUX)
  if RT >= temp_threshold:
    isAlarm = 1
    mqtt.publish('phong-khach.bbc-voice', 'CANH BAO: QUA NHIET!')
  else:
    isAlarm = 0
    mqtt.publish('phong-khach.bbc-voice', ' ')

event_manager.add_timer_event(20000, on_event_timer_callback_D_h_N_j_h)

def on_event_timer_callback_p_W_G_s_w():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(0, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[2])))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(2, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('/')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(3, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[1])))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(5, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('/')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(6, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[0])))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(' ')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(11, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[4])))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(14, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[5])))

event_manager.add_timer_event(5000, on_event_timer_callback_p_W_G_s_w)

# Mô tả hàm này...
def Kh_E1_BB_9Fi_t_E1_BA_A1o():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle, aiot_dht20, aiot_lcd1602, tiny_rgb
  temp_threshold = 40
  isAlarm = 0
  isBlink = 0
  blinkToggle = 0
  colonToggle = 0
  lastMotion = 0
  heartToggle = 0
  motionCooldown = 0

def on_event_timer_callback_b_r_N_S_a():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  if colonToggle == 0:
    aiot_lcd1602.move_to(13, 1)
    aiot_lcd1602.putstr(':')
    colonToggle = 1
  else:
    aiot_lcd1602.move_to(13, 1)
    aiot_lcd1602.putstr(' ')
    colonToggle = 0

event_manager.add_timer_event(2000, on_event_timer_callback_b_r_N_S_a)

tiny_rgb = RGBLed(pin0.pin, 4)

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_khach_bbc_light_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):
  global temp_threshold, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  if th_C3_B4ng_tin == '0':
    isBlink = 0
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))
  elif th_C3_B4ng_tin == '1':
    isBlink = 0
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#ffffff'))
  elif th_C3_B4ng_tin == '2':
    isBlink = 0
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#ffff00'))
  elif th_C3_B4ng_tin == '3':
    isBlink = 0
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#0000ff'))
  elif th_C3_B4ng_tin == '4':
    isBlink = 1
  music.pitch(440, 100)

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_ngu_bbc_fan_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):
  global temp_threshold, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  pin10.write_analog(round(translate((int(th_C3_B4ng_tin)), 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
  music.pitch(440, 100)

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_khach_bbc_door_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):
  global temp_threshold, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  if th_C3_B4ng_tin == '1':
    pin4.servo_write(90)
  else:
    pin4.servo_write(0)
  music.pitch(440, 100)

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_ngu_bbc_threshold_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):
  global temp_threshold, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  temp_threshold = int(th_C3_B4ng_tin)
  music.pitch(440, 100)

# Mô tả hàm này...
def _C4_90_C4_83ng_k_C3_AD_k_C3_AAnh():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle, aiot_dht20, aiot_lcd1602, tiny_rgb
  mqtt.on_receive_message('phong-khach.bbc-light', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_khach_bbc_light_)
  mqtt.on_receive_message('phong-ngu.bbc-fan', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_ngu_bbc_fan_)
  mqtt.on_receive_message('phong-khach.bbc-door', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_khach_bbc_door_)
  mqtt.on_receive_message('phong-ngu.bbc-threshold', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__phong_ngu_bbc_threshold_)

def on_event_timer_callback_g_k_L_w_D():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  if isAlarm == 1:
    isBlink = 0
    if blinkToggle == 0:
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#ff0000'))
      blinkToggle = 1
    else:
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))
      blinkToggle = 0
  if isBlink == 1:
    if blinkToggle == 0:
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#ffffff'))
      blinkToggle = 1
    else:
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))
      blinkToggle = 0

event_manager.add_timer_event(100, on_event_timer_callback_g_k_L_w_D)

def on_event_timer_callback_Z_K_p_S_a():
  global temp_threshold, th_C3_B4ng_tin, RT, isAlarm, isBlink, RH, colonToggle, motionCooldown, LUX, blinkToggle, lastMotion, heartToggle
  if pin1.read_digital()==1:
    if motionCooldown == 0:
      mqtt.publish('phong-khach.bbc-motion', 1)
      motionCooldown = 3
      lastMotion = 1
    else:
      motionCooldown = motionCooldown - 1
  else:
    if lastMotion == 1:
      mqtt.publish('phong-khach.bbc-motion', 0)
      lastMotion = 0
      motionCooldown = 0
  if heartToggle == 0:
    display.show(Image.HEART)
    heartToggle = 1
  else:
    display.show(Image.HEART_SMALL)
    heartToggle = 0

event_manager.add_timer_event(1000, on_event_timer_callback_Z_K_p_S_a)

if True:
  display.scroll('SmartHome')
  mqtt.connect_wifi('', '')
  mqtt.connect_broker(server='io.adafruit.com', port=1883, username='', password='')
  time.sleep_ms(1000)
  ntptime.settime()
  (year, month, mday, week_of_year, hour, minute, second, milisecond) = RTC().datetime()
  RTC().init((year, month, mday, week_of_year, hour+7, minute, second, milisecond))
  aiot_lcd1602.clear()
  Kh_E1_BB_9Fi_t_E1_BA_A1o()
  _C4_90_C4_83ng_k_C3_AD_k_C3_AAnh()
  display.scroll('Connected')

while True:
  event_manager.run()
  mqtt.check_message()
  time.sleep_ms(1000)
  time.sleep_ms(10)
